name: Welcome account
subject: Welcome to {{product_name}}, {{first_name}}
description: A clean onboarding email for a newly created workspace or account.

variables.name: dashboard_url
variables.description: Absolute URL to the product dashboard.

mjml:
<mjml>
  <mj-body background-color="#f4f4f5">
    <mj-section padding="32px">
      <mj-column background-color="#ffffff" border-radius="18px" padding="28px">
        <mj-text font-size="22px" font-weight="700" color="#18181b">Your workspace is ready</mj-text>
        <mj-text color="#3f3f46" line-height="1.6">Hi {{first_name}}, your {{product_name}} workspace has been created. Open the dashboard to finish setup and start sending transactional email.</mj-text>
        <mj-button background-color="#a7c957" color="#18181b" href="{{dashboard_url}}">Open dashboard</mj-button>
      </mj-column>
    </mj-section>
  </mj-body>
</mjml>
author: TemplateForge
useCase: A clean onboarding email for a newly created workspace or account.
